experiences.title: Echo Chamber
experiences.description: Speak. Listen. Return. A living mirror that captures your words and returns them with gentle evolution.
experiences.summary: Type something. Watch it come back changed. Build a personal archive of evolving echoes.
experiences.returnValue: Your echoes persist and become more meaningful over time. You build a personal archive worth returning to.

experiences.title: Pattern Garden
experiences.description: Plant simple rules. Watch patterns grow. Discover how small changes create surprising order.
experiences.summary: Draw rules. Run time. Watch beautiful emergent behavior appear from simple systems.
experiences.returnValue: Save and revisit your patterns. They grow more interesting the more you tend them.

collections.title: Foundations
collections.description: Core interactive building blocks that demonstrate how small meaningful interactions create lasting value.
collections.summary: The first experiences proving the platform model works.

stories.title: The Origin of Echo
stories.description: A reflection on why the first coherent experience was built around listening and repetition.
stories.summary: How listening became the first test of the platform.
stories.narrative: Every platform begins with a single interaction. Echo Chamber was created to prove that even the simplest act of listening and returning can become something worth coming back to.
